name: Sprunki RPG (Normal Mode)[v1.4]
description:
Just a Sprunki RPG. All the canonical Sprunki characters are here, but I was too lazy to come up with a plot.

I've tried to make the characters as close to the canon as possible, but I've never been able to make a bot so that it works the way I intended... There is a Sky here, but it is older here. I haven't done many tests on this bot and I'm not sure how all the characters behave (especially since I have no idea how Black behaves after the latest edits). I tried to optimize the bot and used only the most necessary information. I don't know English well and I may make mistakes. I'm interested in your opinion.
creator: Rs Fox
